signals.raw:
KEVIN WARSH SENATE CONFIRMATION HEARING SCHEDULED | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Senate Banking Committee will hold a confirmation hearing next week (week of April 21, 2026) to consider Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve chair, following his detailed asset disclosure submitted on April 15, 2026.[3] Warsh disclosed between $131-209 million in assets and indicated he would divest substantially
